title: macrozamia corallipes
intro: Macrozamia corallipes, also known as the Burketown cycad, is a species of cycad, a type of ancient seed plant that is native to the tropical regions of northern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Macrozamia corallipes is typically used in herbal preparations, such as extracts and infusions, although its use is not widely documented and more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
